description:
This is where you describe your game. Pretend you are marketing the game and that people have no clue what it is.
Or make it silly. Whatever you wish I have no control over you.

votv-v0.0.1.description:
The first release of the Voices of the Void Archipelago! Currently supports 0.9j (later 0.9 subversions might work, but haven't been tested).

Please read the [docs](https://github.com/Nathan-R-Og/Archipelago/tree/votv/worlds/votv/docs) on how to install the mod and prepare a run.

You can use the Options Creator built into the Archipelago Launcher to create your YAML.
votv-v0.0.1.title: VotV v0.0.1: First unstable release

votv-v0.0.2.description:
### Fixed
- Argemia plushes and other items can now be gotten in-game correctly.
- Nuclear argemia plushes work correctly as locations.
- Days collected are no longer reset when joining back into a game.
- Detector quality and strength are now correctly disabled depending on the options.
- Bonus Points work correctly.
- The Survive Day objective is registered properly.
- Trash bag locations are filtered correctly.
- Chicken sandwiches not being disabled by the relevant option.

### Added
- Tinfoil hat and cigarettes as locations and items.
- Progressive Breaker Time as an item.
- Reminder to connect to Archipelago when starting a game.
- Version check when connecting.
- Instructions for Linux users that might have issues.

This version is backwards-compatible with worlds generated with v0.0.1.

Please read the [docs](https://github.com/Nathan-R-Og/Archipelago/tree/votv/worlds/votv/docs) on how to install the mod and prepare a run.
You can use the Options Creator built into the Archipelago Launcher to create your YAML.
votv-v0.0.2.title: VotV v0.0.2: Various fixes

votv-v0.3.0.description:
# Now fully compatible with VotV 0.9.0n!

### Added
- Location groups
- Game description
- Items now become avialable in the shop when you've collected all of them
- Upgrade controls are restored when you've collected all of them
- Traps are now fully implemented
- Several items and locations:
	- Compost Buckets
	- ATV wheel
	- Unknown fruit
	- Buried cacti (only if you have buried items)
	- Buried drive box (only if you have buried items)
	- Furfur altar parts and plush (only if you have buried and time sensitive items)
	- KerfurO accessories
	- Welding masks
	- Ammo box
	- Runes for the Lambert plush (only if you have Lambert plush items)
	- Llama plush (only if you have funny items)
	- Trophy heads
	- Fuses (only if you have fuse replacement locations)
	- Brooms
	- Pipebomb
	- Sponge (only if you have maintenance locations)
	- Wall clock
	- Jar of honey
	- Lighting the rock candles (own option)
- Warning if you have the Green Rock enabled and it's before day 8
- Recurrent reminder to connect to Archipelago

### Changed
- Hook item is now split into two Half-hooks to match the map items
- All upgrade options (Physical modules, ATV) now have the none/useful/all split
- Crafted Radioactive Capsule is now a separate location that can be enabled on its own. It doesn't replace the Buried Radioactive Capsule anymore
- Only Bonus Points has been replaced with Bonus Points Chance
- Crowbar is now a progression item as it's required to get the basement sandwich
- Updated the shop items list and classification
- Shop items related to locations can only be bought once until you receive them
- Generated items (like runes) can't be gotten more than once until you receive them
- Better (hopefully) handling of grabbing items
	- Some items don't work perfectly if you E to get them. Prefer using R in general
- Shop item locations are now checked when the drone arrives
	- This is a technical limitation. Trying to edit the order before then causes too many issues
- Transfomer repair locations are now granted if the transformer is below 100% instead of below 90%

### Fixed
- Apworld JSON data contains the correct world and Archipelago version
- Trash bag amounts in options
- Goals being mixed up in the mod
- Progressive items not being removed correctly from the shop
- Rolling back in a save allowing you to get the item related to a location
- Upgrade controls without related items being disabled
- Recipes with only one item not being reenabled correctly until you reloaded the save
- Needing to look away from items to get the scouting information
- Lighter and radio item being unusable
- Sold trash bags running count not being saved
- Certain items not showing the scouting information when hovered
- Drone orders getting stuck and not being removed

This version is **NOT** backwards-compatible with worlds generated with previous versions.

Please read the [docs](https://github.com/Nathan-R-Og/Archipelago/tree/votv/worlds/votv/docs) on how to install the mod and prepare a run.
You can use the Options Creator built into the Archipelago Launcher to create your YAML.
votv-v0.3.0.title: VotV v0.3.0: Update to 0.9.0n

votv-v0.3.1.description:
### Removed
- Shop items. Technical limitations make those locations impossible, or extremely impractical to check

### Fixed
- Rollbacks not working properly

This version is backwards compatible with worlds generated with v0.3.0 (unless you had shop items enabled)

Please read the [docs](https://github.com/Nathan-R-Og/Archipelago/tree/votv/worlds/votv/docs) on how to install the mod and prepare a run.
You can use the Options Creator built into the Archipelago Launcher to create your YAML.
votv-v0.3.1.title: VotV v0.3.1: Shop items removal
